Feature: DEEP AUDIT: hx-toast — Enterprise Component Quality Review

## Deep Audit V2: hx-toast

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-toast` component (notification/toast system).

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. ARIA live regions, role="alert"/"status", auto-dismiss timing, screen reader announcements.
